sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal, kindred to the root זָמַם to appoint. [In Sam. Pent. Gen 11:6, יזמנו where the Heb. has יָזְמוּ.]

Piel זִמֵּן id. very frequently used in Chaldee.

Pual, plur. part. עִתִּים מְזֻמָּנִים Ezr 10:14 Neh 10:35, and ע׳ מְזֻמָּנֹות 13:31, times appointed or stated. Hence-
